name: People for the Ethical Treatment of Animals
summary: Animal rights organisation campaigning against animal exploitation in food, clothing, entertainment and research.
description: Relevant for public campaigning, corporate pressure and national attention around animal suffering across industries.
alignment: Listed because its advocacy intersects with Bite Back's pressure campaigns, while Bite Back remains independent.
